member.name: T:Controllo.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Controllo.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Controllo.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Controllo.My.Resources.Resources.Multi

member.name: M:Controllo.C_IBH.Read_Val(Controllo.C_IBH.PlcVar,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.UInt32,System.Int32@)
member.summary: typ : 'E' = Input = 69d, 'A' Output = 65d, 'M' Flags = 77d, 'D' Datablock = 68d nr: Start offset For Input/Output/Flags, For D the start offset within the DB DBNr: Datablock number For typ = 'D' (68d), for Input/Output/Flags 0 size: 0..7 = The bit number within the byte read, 8 = Byte, 16 = Word, 32 = Doubleword val: The value read from the PLC Return Value: Successful operation returns S_OK, E_FAIL On Errors, E_ABORT If the PLC denies access Or E_INVALIDARG if the desination Area in the PLC does Not exist Or Is too small.

member.name: M:Controllo.Form_sinottico.MakeItClockOrNot(System.Windows.Forms.Label,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 'Image indexes => quadrato verde 0 / quadrato blu 3 / grigio 1 'Logica => se ho presenza => blu lampeggiante, se ho vuoto (dominante) => verde

members.member:
Decodificas the vicinanza viti.
0 - Lontano 1 - Vicino 2 - In posizione -1 - Errore

member.name: F:Controllo.Module1.StatiPLC.PresenzaPezzoIncollaggio
member.summary: INCOLLAGGIO_PRESENZA_PEZZI_NONE USInt 0 INCOLLAGGIO_PRESENZA_PEZZI_OLED USInt 1 INCOLLAGGIO_PRESENZA_PEZZI_OLED_OK USInt 2 INCOLLAGGIO_PRESENZA_PEZZI_OLED_NOK USInt 3
